comment: Asset registry for Replay 2026 Badge. The badge fetches this file once a day when Settings -> asset_registry_url is set and surfaces each entry in the Community Apps screen. Add new entries by PR without a firmware change. The public firmware release is a full factory image; large registry files may point at committed raw GitHub files or separately managed release assets.

assets.name: DOOM 1 Shareware
assets.description: Original 1993 shareware episode. Required for the DOOM tile.
